name: regression-sniffer
description: Loyal GitHub action that sniffs out any follow-up and revert commit of your cherry-picked commit

scripts.build: esbuild ./src/main.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --platform=node --target=node24.0.0 --packages=bundle --format=esm --external:debug --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.all: yarn install && yarn run build && yarn run format && yarn test

author: jamacku@redhat.com
